title: Timezone Converter - World Clock & Time Converter
seoDescription: Free online timezone converter and world clock. Convert time between any timezone instantly. Compare UTC, EST, PST, GMT, KST, JST, and over 400 IANA timezones. Perfect for scheduling international meetings, travel planning, and remote work.
howToUseTitle: How to Use the Timezone Converter
step1Desc: Open the tool and your local timezone and current time are automatically detected. The world clock shows popular cities instantly.
step2Desc: Select any timezone from the dropdown — over 400 IANA timezones available including EST, PST, GMT, CET, IST, JST, KST, AEST and more.
step3Desc: Enter a specific time to convert, or just compare current times between timezones. Click Swap to reverse the conversion direction. Perfect for scheduling meetings across countries.
use4: Convert event times for global audience
faq1Q: What timezone does this tool use?
faq1A: The tool uses your browser's timezone setting and IANA timezone database for accurate conversion including Daylight Saving Time.
faq2A: Yes — all conversions account for Daylight Saving Time automatically. The DST indicator shows whether the selected timezone is currently observing DST.
faq3A: Over 400 IANA timezones are supported, covering every region in the world. Use the searchable dropdown to find any city.
